creator: gerrit.beine@gmx.de
text:
MediaWiki 1.8 is no longer supported

Fix: 

CONFLICTS=	mediawiki-1.[0-79].*
+DEPRECATED=	No longer supported, please upgrade your wiki installation
+EXPIRES=	2007-06-30

 NO_BUILD=	yes
 USE_MYSQL=	yes--pA7zzBH8TvwzB85ojlTycju08mzz2m4pMYOJu9d6aCibUIpH
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

diff -Nur /usr/ports/www/mediawiki18/Makefile mediawiki18/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/www/mediawiki18/Makefile	Sat Mar  3 13:42:30 2007
+++ mediawiki18/Makefile	Sun Jun 10 15:24:44 2007
@@ -15,6 +15,8 @@
 COMMENT=	The wiki engine used by Wikipedia
